Tests the multiplication of two Boolean objects in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the result of multiplying two `Boolean` objects in JavaScript. It uses the `assert` function to verify that the product of `new Boolean(true)` and `new Boolean(true)` is equal to `1`. This test demonstrates the behavior of JavaScript when performing arithmetic operations on `Boolean` objects, which are converted to their numeric equivalents (`true` to `1` and `false` to `0`) during the operation. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific aspect of JavaScript's type conversion and arithmetic operations.
